description: SYNTHETIC tier-ladder demonstration (P29/P30) — NOT a faithful clinical case and NOT harvested from any real submission. Deliberately constructed to exercise the 1.3.0 affirmative screeners: Cognitive rated 'above' WITH a descriptive detail (renders at T3), Adaptive rated 'I have not had enough opportunity to observe' (renders at T1-obs, raising a collect-elsewhere flag). Non-tier answers are minimal synthetic fillers. Synthetic student D.S. — not a real case.
